'''âs-t-j''' ('''sataja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultrafiltrate|ultrafiltrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultrafiltrate|ultrafiltrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-t-j
|-
! Lemma
| sataja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:satajithi|satajithi]] || [[word:satajiji|satajiji]] || [[word:satajishi|satajishi]] || [[word:sataji|sataji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:satajuthuth|satajuthuth]] || [[word:satajujuj|satajujuj]] || [[word:satajushush|satajushush]] || [[word:sataj|sataj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:satajuthu|satajuthu]] || [[word:satajuju|satajuju]] || [[word:satajushu|satajushu]] || [[word:sataju|sataju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:satajufuth|satajufuth]] || [[word:satajufuj|satajufuj]] || [[word:satajufush|satajufush]] || [[word:satajuf|satajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:satajethe|satajethe]] || [[word:satajeje|satajeje]] || [[word:satajeshe|satajeshe]] || [[word:sataje|sataje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:satajothoth|satajothoth]] || [[word:satajojoj|satajojoj]] || [[word:satajoshosh|satajoshosh]] || [[word:sataj|sataj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:satajotho|satajotho]] || [[word:satajojo|satajojo]] || [[word:satajosho|satajosho]] || [[word:satajo|satajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:satajofoth|satajofoth]] || [[word:satajofoj|satajofoj]] || [[word:satajofosh|satajofosh]] || [[word:satajof|satajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:satajĂŠthĂŠ|satajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:satajĂŠjĂŠ|satajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:satajĂŠshĂŠ|satajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:satajĂŠ|satajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:satajathath|satajathath]] || [[word:satajajaj|satajajaj]] || [[word:satajashash|satajashash]] || [[word:sataj|sataj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:satajatha|satajatha]] || [[word:satajaja|satajaja]] || [[word:satajasha|satajasha]] || [[word:sataja|sataja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:satajafath|satajafath]] || [[word:satajafaj|satajafaj]] || [[word:satajafash|satajafash]] || [[word:satajaf|satajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:satajasha|satajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosatajasha|gosatajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisatajasha|gokisatajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:satajnĂŒsha|satajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosatajnknĂŒsha|gosatajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisatajnĂŒsha|gokisatajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:satajshĂ«sha|satajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosatajnkshĂ«sha|gosatajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisatajshĂ«sha|gokisatajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:satajrosha|satajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatajnkrosha|gosatajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatajrosha|gokisatajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:satajmusha|satajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatajnkmusha|gosatajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatajmusha|gokisatajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:satajsherasha|satajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosatajnksherasha|gosatajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisatajsherasha|gokisatajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:satajngasha|satajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosatajnkngasha|gosatajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisatajngasha|gokisatajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:satajyasha|satajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosatajnkyasha|gosatajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisatajyasha|gokisatajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:satajyamasha|satajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosatajnkyamasha|gosatajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisatajyamasha|gokisatajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:satajnĂŒshĂ«sha|satajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosatajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosatajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisatajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisatajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:satajnĂŒrosha|satajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatajnknĂŒrosha|gosatajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatajnĂŒrosha|gokisatajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satajnĂŒmusha|satajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatajnknĂŒmusha|gosatajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatajnĂŒmusha|gokisatajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:satajshĂ«nĂŒsha|satajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosatajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosatajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisatajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisatajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:satajshĂ«rosha|satajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatajnkshĂ«rosha|gosatajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatajshĂ«rosha|gokisatajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satajshĂ«musha|satajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatajnkshĂ«musha|gosatajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatajshĂ«musha|gokisatajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:satajronĂŒsha|satajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosatajnkronĂŒsha|gosatajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisatajronĂŒsha|gokisatajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:satajroshĂ«sha|satajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosatajnkroshĂ«sha|gosatajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisatajroshĂ«sha|gokisatajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satajromusha|satajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatajnkromusha|gosatajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatajromusha|gokisatajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:satajmunĂŒsha|satajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosatajnkmunĂŒsha|gosatajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisatajmunĂŒsha|gokisatajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:satajmushĂ«sha|satajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosatajnkmushĂ«sha|gosatajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisatajmushĂ«sha|gokisatajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:satajmurosha|satajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatajnkmurosha|gosatajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatajmurosha|gokisatajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sataj|sataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠj|sĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosataj|hosataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠtĂŠj|hosĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosataj|hohosataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠtĂŠj|hohosĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsataj|nĂŒsataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠtĂŠj|nĂŒsĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsataj|nĂŒnĂŒsataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠtĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsataj|nĂŻsataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠtĂŠj|nĂŻsĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsataj|nĂŻnĂŻsataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠtĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusataj|lusataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠtĂŠj|lusĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusataj|lulusataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠtĂŠj|lulusĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisataj|lisataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠtĂŠj|lisĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisataj|lilisataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠtĂŠj|lilisĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosataj|kosataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠtĂŠj|kosĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosataj|kokosataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠtĂŠj|kokosĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesataj|kesataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠtĂŠj|kesĂŠtĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesataj|kekesataj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠtĂŠj|kekesĂŠtĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
